CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JONES, MATT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERTS, BRAD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, DATE REQUESTED IS 8/3/01 10:00 AM. $10.00 FEE PAID.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-03-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-07-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE IS FOR PLAINTIFF TO BE SERVED WITH DEFENDANT'S CLAIM AND FOR DEFENDANT TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE ON THE DEFENDANT'S CLAIM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY ROBERTS, BRAD AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MATT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-11-2001 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, MATT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAILING TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: UNCLAIMED.
PLAINTIFF BRAD ROBERTS REQUEST TO CONTINUE HEARING DATE TO SEPTEMBER 21, 2001 AT 8:30 AM SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-11-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-03-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUANCE REQUEST BY DEFT.
REM: PLTF'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST REC'D IN COURT AND TO BE RULED AT TRIAL-PER COMM. KAPLAN.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MATT JONES RETURNED SIGNED.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-05-2001, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-26-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO APPEARANCES ON 10/26/01, THE COURT WILL DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WITH PREJUDICE. (PARTIES SETTLED) AND WILL RULE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-07-2001, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-05-2001 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
